instruction: Four clocks (a 2×2 grid), each with hour and minute hands pointing up/right. Rotate EVERY minute-hand to point straight DOWN (x2 = pivot x, y2 = pivot y + 16). Hour-hands and clock faces unchanged.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 144 144" width="144" height="144">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="144" height="144" fill="white" />
  <g id="clock-1" data-source="heroicons/outline/clock.svg" transform="translate(16, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 6v6h4.5m4.5 0a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/></g>
  <line id="hand-1-h" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" x1="40" y1="40" x2="40" y2="28" />
  <line id="hand-1-m" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1.5" x1="40" y1="40" x2="56" y2="40" />
  <g id="clock-2" data-source="heroicons/outline/clock.svg" transform="translate(80, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 6v6h4.5m4.5 0a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/></g>
  <line id="hand-2-h" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" x1="104" y1="40" x2="104" y2="28" />
  <line id="hand-2-m" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1.5" x1="104" y1="40" x2="120" y2="40" />
  <g id="clock-3" data-source="heroicons/outline/clock.svg" transform="translate(16, 80) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 6v6h4.5m4.5 0a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/></g>
  <line id="hand-3-h" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" x1="40" y1="104" x2="40" y2="92" />
  <line id="hand-3-m" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1.5" x1="40" y1="104" x2="56" y2="104" />
  <g id="clock-4" data-source="heroicons/outline/clock.svg" transform="translate(80, 80) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 6v6h4.5m4.5 0a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/></g>
  <line id="hand-4-h" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" x1="104" y1="104" x2="104" y2="92" />
  <line id="hand-4-m" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1.5" x1="104" y1="104" x2="120" y2="104" />
</svg>
